title: Jonami Santa Sack, 1 Extra Large Velvet Santa Bag for Storing, Holiday Presents, Stocking Stuffers. Traditional Red and White (70 x 110 cm)
features: ❆ EXTRA LARGE SANTA SACK ❆ This sack of Santa Claus is 70 cm W x 110 cm H; its generous size makes it larger and roomier than similar gift sacks available. This means it can hold more presents!

❆ ENSURE LONG-TERM USE ❆ Use the sack year after year, save on wrapping paper and make wrapping unusually shaped items easy! Highest quality materials and workmanship ensures your Santa sack will last for many seasons to come!

❆ EXTRA SOFT PLUSH ❆ We use only soft and fluffy plush material. Trimmed short in the classic red part , a bit longer on the white to give that fluffy look. The pompom is about 5 cm big and done by the same material. If hand washed will maintain its softness for years.
❆ MAXIMUM CHRISTMAS ATMOSPHERE ❆ Excellent decoration for Christmas at home, restaurant, hotel, club, bar. Let your family, friends and colleagues feel the Christmas atmosphere!

❆ SATISFACTION GUARANTEED ❆ We are committed to providing you with the highest quality and full customer satisfaction. If you're not completely satisfied, contact us and we'll personally work with you until you're 100% happy.
description: Product Description Amazing Santa Sack Attention to every detail! This sack of Santa Claus is meticulously crafted, we used the best materials: smooth and resistant velvet, soft and delicate plush, long resistant cord and spongy pompom. We left nothing to chance! XXL Sack For every kind of gift! A large sack to hold even the biggest gifts for your children. Finally you can put everything in one bag, without leaving the gifts around the tree. Christmas atmosphere Because details matter! What an amazing surprise it will be finding Santa’s sack full of gifts under the tree. Santa Claus really came to leave his presents ... how wonderful!
